title: lobelia zelayensis
intro: Lobelia zelayensis, also known as Zelaya lobelia, is a plant species belonging to the Lobelia genus, native to Central America. Lobelia zelayensis has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and improving circulation. In herbal preparations, Lobelia zelayensis is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, typically in combination with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties.
